circuits.designation: Retail floor lighting (LED track + emergency egress)

non_compliance_flags.message: GFCI required by NEC 210.8(B) on commercial sales floor + fitting room receptacles (C02, C03, C05). Specified as 10mA Class A GFCI per UL 943. Verify with AHJ where any receptacle is within 6 ft of a sink during tenant fit-out.

assumptions: Diversity factor 0.8 applied to combined tenant load per NEC 220.61 (commercial retail).
Selectivity verification deferred (tool_call_pending) per WI3 — fault-level intent absent and engineer Ifault not declared.
Cable ampacity check assumes NEC Table 310.16 (THWN-2 in conduit, 30°C ambient): 12 AWG Cu = 25 A; 14 AWG Cu = 20 A. 20A breaker on 12 AWG and 15A breaker on 14 AWG both comply with In ≤ Iz.
EGC sizing per NEC 250.122 — 12 AWG Cu EGC for 20A circuits, 14 AWG Cu EGC for 15A HVAC control.

GFCI protection 10mA Class A applied to sales floor, sales counter, and fitting room receptacles (C02, C03, C05) per NEC 210.8(B). C04 POS dedicated is exempt under NEC 210.8(B) exception (dedicated outlet for electronic data-processing equipment) when not readily accessible.
C08 suite emergency lighting circuit has NO GFCI per NEC 700.6 / NFPA 101 life-safety availability principle.

rationale.chat_summary: 100A 208Y/120V 3-phase NEMA Type 1 tenant sub-panel for Suite 100 apparel retail tenant. 8 circuits sized per NEC Table 310.16 (12 AWG / 14 AWG). GFCI per NEC 210.8(B) applied to sales floor + fitting room receptacles. Emergency lighting (C08) circuit exempt from GFCI per NEC 700.6. Selectivity deferred (tool_call_pending) until fault-level skill ships. Reply to refine, e.g. 'add tenant kitchen' or 'add EV charger for back-of-house'.

sections.title: Board Classification
sections.summary: US NEMA Type 1 panelboard, 100A, 30-way tenant sub-panel. Per NEC Article 408 — maximum 42 overcurrent devices per panelboard section (well within limit).

decisions.label: NEMA Type 1 enclosure
decisions.summary: Indoor general purpose; suitable for tenant service closet.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 208Y/120V 3-phase 4-wire 60 Hz, 100A 2-pole feeder from MSP-A in landlord's service room. POCO-declared utility service derived through MSP-A; tenant sub-feeder Ze = 0.10Ω.

decisions.label: 100A 2-pole feeder
decisions.summary: Standard US tenant sub-panel rating for ~5000 sq ft retail occupancy.
decisions.rule: NEC tenant feeder sizing per NEC 220 load calculation

sections.title: Busbar Sizing
sections.summary: 100A busbar matches feeder rating, IcW 10 kA. Sum of loads 9.9 kW (~28A diversified). 100A busbar has 70% headroom for tenant fit-out additions.

decisions.label: 100A busbar IcW 10 kA
decisions.summary: Sized to match feeder OCPD at MSP-A.

sections.title: Way Assignment
sections.summary: 8 ways used (8 × single-pole 20A/15A MCBs W1-W8), 22 ways spare for tenant fit-out flexibility.

sections.title: OCPD Selection
sections.summary: Branch circuits sized per NEC 240. All 20A circuits on 12 AWG (25A ampacity per NEC Table 310.16). 15A HVAC control on 14 AWG (20A ampacity). All In ≤ Iz pass.

decisions.label: Thermal-magnetic MCBs per NEC 240
decisions.summary: Standard US OCPD for retail branch circuits.

sections.title: RCD Strategy
sections.summary: NEC 210.8(B) commercial GFCI applies. 10mA Class A GFCI on C02 (sales floor recpts), C03 (sales counter recpts), C05 (fitting room — wet location adjacent). C04 POS dedicated exempt (210.8(B) exception). C08 emergency lighting NO GFCI per NEC 700.6 (life-safety availability).

decisions.label: GFCI per NEC 210.8(B)
decisions.summary: Commercial retail receptacle locations require GFCI per 2023 update; emergency lighting is exempt.
decisions.rule: NEC 210.8(B) commercial GFCI requirements + NEC 700.6 life-safety exception

sections.title: Cable Selection
sections.summary: THWN-2 copper conductors in EMT conduit per NEC Table 310.16 at 30°C ambient. Cores: 1 hot + 1 neutral + 1 EGC for single-phase branch circuits.

sections.title: Selectivity Verification
sections.summary: 8 cascade pairs (MSP-A → C01..C08) emitted as tool_call_pending. fault-level intent absent; engineer Ifault not declared. Will re-emit once fault-level skill ships.

decisions.label: All cascades tool_call_pending
decisions.rule: NEC 240.4 protection of conductors + 240.86 series ratings

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Compliant. One INFO flag for AHJ GFCI scope verification at tenant fit-out + one TOOL-CALL-PENDING flag for deferred selectivity.
